Internal Compliance Memo — Orion Ridge Foods, Inc. (PH issuer) — Q2 Privacy and Disclosure Update
This note supports the SEC Form 17-A preparations and confirms no MNPI is being included; references to “insider” and “material” below are policy terms only.
Public/stale items: the board-approved dividend policy framework was announced on PSE EDGE on 2026-03-28 and reiterated in SEC Form 17-C filed 2026-04-01.
HR onboarding forms (OF-1 PH, rev. 2026-02) implement data minimisation by removing non-required fields for place of birth and middle name; no exception requests are open.
Data retention remains as per Schedule R-EMP-5: ex-employee payroll and BIR withholding records retained for five (5) years; no early erasure or hold breaches were observed.
One cross-border transfer was approved and completed under Data Export Approval DEA-2026-07 for HRIS payroll attributes to Payluma Pte. Ltd. (Singapore) pursuant to DPA Schedule HR-3 and NPC guidance; scope was limited, encrypted, and access-logged.
No other cross-border transfers are live, and the DSA with IslaVista Shared Services PH covers only in-country processing with BayanTrust Bank, Inc., Account No. 00-XYZ-12345 (non-transactional reference).
Consent withdrawal workflow is active but there are zero open tickets; the one withdrawal logged in Q1 was executed and closed with no residual processing.
A DSAR (Ref: HR-DSAR-0041) was fulfilled on 2026-05-12 for a former employee ID EE-0741, including targeted erasure of obsolete training logs and issuance of the standard NPC-compliant response.
No DSARs are pending, and there is no request for correction under the Data Privacy Act currently in flight.
SEC disclosure controls: draft language for the commercial paper renewal avoids operational details that could be construed as MNPI; placeholders such as “ISIN ZX0000000000” are non-final and invalid.
Tax and banking references herein are generic and not transaction-bearing; cheque series “CHK-0000-VOID” and BIR filing window notes are templates only.
For avoidance of doubt, no biometric, health, or government ID numbers are collected in the revised onboarding pack, and the “erasure” term in section 8 is a policy label, not an incident report.
Queries may be directed to privacy@orionridge.com.ph or disclosure@orionridge.com.ph, which are monitored role mailboxes per our NPC registration and SEC certification records.
